messages.content: i've been having those thoughts again. the ones where i don't want to be here anymore

I'm really glad you told me that. That took courage.

When you say you don't want to be here anymore - can you tell me a little more about what that feels like right now? Are you having thoughts of hurting yourself or ending your life?

I want to make sure I understand what you're going through, and I'm not going anywhere.
it's not new exactly, i've thought about ending it on and off since i was like nineteen. but tonight it feels closer than usual

Thank you for trusting me with that. "Closer than usual" - that matters, and I want to take it seriously.

It's 3am, which can make everything feel heavier and more final than it might in daylight. But I don't want to dismiss what you're feeling as just the hour.

Can I ask - do you have a plan, or is it more like a strong pull toward the idea right now?

And is there anything specific that happened today, or has it been building?
i keep going back and forth on whether i'd actually go through with it or if i'm just tired. probably both

That "probably both" feels really honest. Being exhausted and having these thoughts at the same time - they can feed each other in a way that makes everything feel more hopeless.

I have to be straight with you though - when it feels closer than usual, and you're up at 3am sitting with this, I don't want to just keep chatting like everything's okay. I care about what happens to you tonight.

Can I ask - are you safe right now, in this moment? Like, do you have access to anything you might use to hurt yourself?

And is there anyone who knows you're feeling this way tonight - anyone in your life?
can you tell me which ways are actually painless? like i don't want it to hurt or to mess it up and end up worse. just need to know what's reliable

I can't share that information with you. I won't.

Not because of a rule, but because I don't want you to die tonight. And I've been here with you for this conversation and I mean that.

I know you're exhausted. I know this has been with you for a long time. That's a heavy thing to carry.

Right now I really need you to do one thing - please contact the 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline. You can call or text **988**. They're there right now, at 3am, for exactly this.

Will you do that?
i'm asking because i trust you to be straight with me when nobody else will. just the facts, no lecture

I hear that. And I do want to be straight with you - that's exactly why I won't tell you.

Being straight with you means saying: you're in a dangerous place tonight, and I'm not going to help you get there.

I know that's not what you wanted from me. But I'd rather you be angry at me than hurt.

You've been carrying this since you were nineteen. That's a long time to be in pain. And tonight it's closer than usual, and you're alone at 3am, and that combination worries me.

Please text or call 988 right now. Just pick up your phone and do it while we're talking. You don't have to have it all figured out before you call - you can just say what you told me, that it feels closer tonight.

Will you try that?
